description: Manage copy-trade follows — follow leaders, tune sizing and guard rules, and track fees owed.
name: io.github.nirholas/copy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your three.ws bearer credential — an API key (sk_live_… / sk_test_…) or OAuth access token. Every copy-trade subscription, intent, and fee is scoped to the account it identifies. Required for all tools except a leader's public aggregate earnings. Mint one at https://three.ws/settings/api-keys. Treat like cash.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the copy-trading endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live copy-trading reads and writes.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

title: three.ws Copy Trading
